plan.title: swarm: implement Grok Build / spawn_subagent launch path in Phase 3 (slice 2 of #1342)

narratives.Overview: Add a first-class launch adapter that uses the available spawn_subagent tool, supplies the canonical preamble + adapted prompt, and works with worktree context.
narratives.ProblemStatement: See GitHub issue #1342 for full context.
narratives.Goals: Implement the assigned slice(s) from the TDD plan in #1342 using the hybrid workaround approach described in the same issue.
narratives.UserStories: As a developer using Grok Build / non-Warp, I want the swarm skill to work natively.
